mapper.insert: insert into user_account (userId, password, auth) values(#{userId} , #{userPw}, 1)
mapper.select: select * from user_account where userId = #{userId} and password = #{userPw} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT into item_info (itemName, total, cost, auth) values(#{itemName} , #{total}, #{cost}, #{auth});
mapper.update: UPDATE item_info SET total = #{total}, cost = #{cost}, auth = #{auth} WHERE itemName = #{targetItemname};
